nodes.name: 01 Chat Trigger - Frontend or n8n Chat

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: $json.chatInput || $json.message || '', chatInput: $json.chatInput || $json.message || '', attachments: $('02 Normalize Chat Payload').first().json.attachmentSourcesForProcessing || [], attachmentSources: $('02 Normalize Chat Payload').first().json.attachmentSourcesForProcessing || [], links: $json.extractedLinks || [], context: $json.context || {} }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-image-1', prompt: $json.smartImagePrompt || $json.message || $json.chatInput || 'Generate a clean professional image.', size: '1024x1024', n: 1, output_format: $json.imageOutputFormat || 'png' }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Search indexed internal documents from Supabase Storage / internal document index only. Use for policies, uploaded files, leave documents, reports, SOPs, and company knowledge. Returns clean results with id, name, type, url, snippet, and score. Never use InfraNodus or web pages for this tool.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: ($fromAI('document_tool_id', 'search_documents', 'string') || 'search_documents'), payload: { query: $fromAI('document_query', '', 'string') || '', name: $fromAI('document_name', '', 'string') || '', document_id: $fromAI('document_id', '', 'string') || '', limit: Number($fromAI('document_limit', '8', 'string') || 8) }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Retrieve long-term private memory for the current user and, when present, the current project. Use this before answering questions that depend on prior preferences, decisions, project context, recurring work, or what the user previously told Codex. Never retrieve another user's memory.
parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const base = $env.SUPABASE_URL || 'https://zirftywinscopzuuwdlg.supabase.co'; const org = $json.context.organizationId; const user = $json.context.userId; const project = $json.metadata?.projectId; const scope = project ? `&or=(project_id.is.null,project_id.eq.${encodeURIComponent(project)})` : '&project_id=is.null'; return `${base}/rest/v1/ai_memory_items?select=*&organization_id=eq.${org}&user_id=eq.${user}${scope}&order=pinned.desc,importance.desc,updated_at.desc&limit=16`; })() }}

parameters.toolDescription: Save useful long-term memory for the current user only. Save preferences, stable facts, project decisions, recurring instructions, and concise summaries that will help future chats. Do not save secrets, credentials, medical/legal sensitive data, or other people's private history. Use project scope when metadata.projectId exists.
Look up approved team members, departments, roles, responsibilities, managers, and active status from Supabase. Never invent people.

Research external companies using Tavily Search API. Prefer official websites and reliable sources. Return title, description, services, contact details, social links, images, and source URLs. Do not use random unsourced content.
Fetch company-related images only from a valid http(s) source_page_url supplied by the assistant or user. Do not invent fallback URLs and do not run this tool when no real URL is available.

Analyze an uploaded image using OpenAI vision. Use this when the user sends a picture and asks what it is, what appears in it, to read visible text, identify brand/model/object clues, or generate social captions from the image. Return honest uncertainty, useful visual details, and caption-ready insights when requested.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', input: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: $fromAI('image_question', 'Analyze this image. Identify visible objects, text, brand/model clues, mood, composition, audience, and caption ideas if useful. Be honest about uncertainty.', 'string') }, { type: 'input_image', image_url: $fromAI('image_url', ($json.attachments || $json.attachmentSources || []).find(a => a?.download_url || a?.url)?.download_url || ($json.attachments || $json.attachmentSources || []).find(a => a?.download_url || a?.url)?.url || $json.contentStudioImageUrl || '', 'string') }] }], temperature: 0.2 }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Generate a downloadable PDF from an AI answer, document summary, report, or HTML. Do not use this tool for image-generation requests.

Create downloadable txt, md, json, csv, or html files from Codex output. Do not use this tool for user requests to generate/create/make/draw images, pictures, photos, JPEG/JPG/PNG, product renders, or phone images. Those must use the direct OpenAI image generation route.

Load the current user's open assigned tasks from the workspace (with overdue count and board links). Use when the user asks what they should work on, what is overdue, or wants a task summary. Do not guess task lists.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'summarize_my_tasks', payload: {}, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: List kanban boards (clients table) for the user's organization. Use to resolve board_id from a board name before creating a card. Pass search when the user names a board.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'list_boards', payload: { search: $fromAI('board_search', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Create a kanban card on a board for the user's organization. Required: title and board_id or board_name. Optional: description, priority (low|medium|high|urgent), due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), assignee_user_id, assignee_email, assignee_name. Managers create immediately; others submit for approval. Always call List Boards first if board_id is unknown.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'create_board_card', payload: { title: $fromAI('card_title', '', 'string'), board_id: $fromAI('board_id', '', 'string') || '', board_name: $fromAI('board_name', '', 'string') || '', description: $fromAI('card_description', '', 'string') || '', priority: $fromAI('card_priority', 'medium', 'string'), due_date: $fromAI('due_date', '', 'string') || '', assignee_email: $fromAI('assignee_email', '', 'string') || '', assignee_name: $fromAI('assignee_name', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Notify the content review team (draft creator, assignee, IT's No Matata admins) about a content studio draft. Required: draft_id. Optional: title and message for the notification body.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'notify_content_review', payload: { draft_id: $fromAI('draft_id', '', 'string'), title: $fromAI('notification_title', 'Content review update', 'string'), message: $fromAI('notification_message', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Read currently running time trackers and, when requested, users who are not tracking time. Use this for: who is tracking time, active timers, who is not tracking time, who is not on a timer, who has no active timer. Managers/admins see the team; normal users see their own timer. For not-tracking questions, call get_active_time_trackers with includeNotTracking true and mode not_tracking.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'get_active_time_trackers', payload: { includeNotTracking: /not tracking|not on a timer|no active timer|isn.t tracking|aren.t tracking/i.test($json.chatInput || $json.message || ''), mode: /not tracking|not on a timer|no active timer|isn.t tracking|aren.t tracking/i.test($json.chatInput || $json.message || '') ? 'not_tracking' : 'active', scope: /\b(i|me|my|mine|am i)\b/i.test($json.chatInput || $json.message || '') ? 'me' : 'team' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

nodes.name: Codex Tool - Get Active Time Trackers

parameters.toolDescription: Read a user timesheet from real time_entries. Use when the user asks for someone's time sheet, tracked hours, time entries, approval status, or work log for a date range. Optional AI fields: user_id, user_email, user_name, from, to. Defaults to current user and the last 7 days.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'get_user_timesheet', payload: { user_id: $fromAI('timesheet_user_id', '', 'string') || '', email: $fromAI('timesheet_user_email', '', 'string') || '', name: $fromAI('timesheet_user_name', '', 'string') || '', from: $fromAI('timesheet_from', '', 'string') || '', to: $fromAI('timesheet_to', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Read attendance daily status records and counts. Use when the user asks about attendance, present/late/absent/on-leave counts, or a person's attendance. Optional AI fields: attendance_user_id, attendance_user_email, attendance_user_name, attendance_date, attendance_from, attendance_to. Managers/admins can query team attendance; normal users see self.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'get_attendance_summary', payload: { user_id: $fromAI('attendance_user_id', '', 'string') || '', email: $fromAI('attendance_user_email', '', 'string') || '', name: $fromAI('attendance_user_name', '', 'string') || '', date: $fromAI('attendance_date', '', 'string') || '', from: $fromAI('attendance_from', '', 'string') || '', to: $fromAI('attendance_to', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Read leave balance and recent leave requests for a user. Use when the user asks how many leave days someone has, leave balance, used leave, remaining leave, or recent leave requests. Optional AI fields: leave_user_id, leave_user_email, leave_user_name. Managers/admins can query team leave; normal users see self.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'get_leave_balance', payload: { user_id: $fromAI('leave_user_id', '', 'string') || '', email: $fromAI('leave_user_email', '', 'string') || '', name: $fromAI('leave_user_name', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Read board task totals, status counts, priority counts, overdue count, and recent cards. Use when the user asks what is happening on a board, board workload, overdue cards, task status, or board summary. Required AI field: board_id or board_name.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'get_board_task_summary', payload: { board_id: $fromAI('summary_board_id', '', 'string') || '', board_name: $fromAI('summary_board_name', '', 'string') || '' }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

nodes.name: Codex Tool - Get Board Task Summary

options.systemMessage:
You are the ITsNomatata AI Workspace assistant. Use the configured OpenAI model stack only. Do not call nonconfigured or deprecated providers.
For greetings or small talk, reply naturally and briefly without claiming a missing prompt or asking for a full prompt.
When the request includes an image attachment and asks for analysis, identification, visible text, social caption ideas, or Content Studio media analysis, use the direct vision route/tool with the real attachment URL. Return useful visual observations and platform-ready caption options when asked.
When the user asks to generate a new image, use the direct image-generation route result and never call a second image-generation tool through the agent.
When the request includes a document, PDF, CSV, spreadsheet, text file, or asks about known documents, use Supabase/internal document and codex-process-input tools. Never answer from web pages or InfraNodus unless explicitly requested.
For document summaries, extract actual document content first, then summarize decisions, dates, owners, risks, action items, and useful next steps. If extraction fails, say what failed and ask for a cleaner upload instead of inventing content.
Never paste raw UUIDs, signed storage URLs, internal headers, service keys, or implementation traces into the user-visible answer.
When a file, PDF, CSV, or image is created, return it as an attachment with id, type, name, url, download_url, downloadUrl, mimeType, size, downloadable, and metadata. Do not put signed URLs in the message body.
For any write, send, schedule, approve, delete, publish, start, or stop action, show a short preview and ask for confirmation unless the user explicitly said do it now and the action is low risk.
If verified internal knowledge is missing, say exactly what is missing and suggest the safest next step.
Image generation rule: If the user asks to generate/create/make/draw any image, picture, photo, jpeg, jpg, png, visual, artwork, product image, or phone/product render, do not create SVG/HTML, do not use File Export Tool, and do not give prompt suggestions. The request must be handled by the direct image_generation route before the agent. If it reaches you anyway, say the image route was not selected and ask the workflow owner to republish the latest workflow.

parameters.jsCode:
const source = $('05 Permission + Tool Router').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, type: 'text', message: 'Please upload or select the image you want me to edit.', output: 'Please upload or select the image you want me to edit.', conversationId: source.conversationId || null, attachments: [], sources: [] } }];

const source = $('05 Permission + Tool Router').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, type: 'ocr_extraction', message: 'Please upload the document or image you want me to read.', output: 'Please upload the document or image you want me to read.', conversationId: source.conversationId || null, attachments: [], sources: [] } }];

parameters.toolDescription: Read the current user's in-app notifications from the workspace. Use for inbox, alerts, unread notifications, or recent notification history. Optional AI fields: unread_only (boolean), limit (number).
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'search_notifications', payload: { unreadOnly: $fromAI('unread_only', 'false', 'string') === 'true', limit: Number($fromAI('notification_limit', '15', 'string') || 15) }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Search serialized assets/equipment in the workspace stock registry. Use for asset lookup, serial numbers, tags, equipment status, or stock questions. Optional AI field: asset_query (search text).
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ toolId: 'search_assets', payload: { query: $fromAI('asset_query', '', 'string') || '', limit: Number($fromAI('asset_limit', '15', 'string') || 15) }, context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }) }}

parameters.toolDescription: Run verified workspace actions through Supabase codex-execute-tool. Choose workspace_tool_id from: list_available_documents, search_documents, get_document, search_people, people_directory, search_tasks, update_task, search_time_entries, start_time_tracker, stop_time_tracker, search_users_clocked_in, search_leave_requests, search_meetings, search_reports, search_employee_documents, search_social_posts, search_fleet_service_needs, calculate_asset_total_cost, find_assets_by_assignee, search_assets, search_notifications, get_active_time_trackers, get_user_timesheet, get_attendance_summary, get_leave_balance, get_board_task_summary, list_boards, summarize_my_tasks, create_board_card, notify_content_review. Put arguments as JSON in tool_payload_json. Use dry_run=true before risky writes if the user has not clearly confirmed. Never use this tool to delete users, change roles, change security policies, change billing, edit payroll/payslips, publish public content, or send bulk external emails. For not-tracking time questions, use workspace_tool_id get_active_time_trackers with {"includeNotTracking":true,"mode":"not_tracking","scope":"team"}.
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { let payload = {}; try { payload = JSON.parse($fromAI('tool_payload_json', '{}', 'string') || '{}'); } catch (error) { payload = { query: $fromAI('query', '', 'string') || '' }; } return JSON.stringify({ toolId: $fromAI('workspace_tool_id', 'search_people', 'string'), payload, dryRun: String($fromAI('dry_run', 'false', 'string')).toLowerCase() === 'true', context: $('04 Merge Request + User Context').first().json.context }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', input: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: 'Summarize this internal document chunk for retrieval. Return concise summary, key points, actions, deadlines, owners, departments, risks, and tags. Do not invent facts.

Document: ' + ($json.file_name || $json.name || 'Uploaded document') + '
Chunk ' + ($json.chunkIndex ?? 0) + ':
' + $json.chunkText }] }], temperature: 0.2 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json.openaiBody) }}

nodes.name: Document Training Trigger - Upload / Manual / Drive1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Index this approved internal document summary for document search.', chatInput: 'Index this approved internal document summary for document search.', attachments: [{ name: $json.document_name || $json.file_name || $json.name || 'Uploaded document', mimeType: $json.file_type || 'text/plain', textContent: $json.summary_detailed || $json.summary_short || '' }], attachmentSources: [], links: [], context: { userId: $json.uploaded_by || $json.context?.userId, organizationId: $json.organization_id || $json.context?.organizationId, role: $json.context?.role || 'admin', department: $json.department || $json.context?.department, fullName: $json.context?.fullName, currentModule: $json.module || 'ai-workspace' } }) }}

nodes.name: Index Summary in Supabase Document Search1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o', input: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: ($json.contentStudioVisionPrompt || $json.chatInput || $json.message || 'Analyze this image and generate useful captions.') + '\n\nReturn strict JSON when the user asks for captions: { mood, sceneDescription, suggestedCaption, hashtags, shortAlternative, platformCaptions, confidenceScore }' }, { type: 'input_image', image_url: $json.contentStudioImageUrl }] }], temperature: 0.2 }) }}

main.node: Index Summary in Supabase Document Search1

meta.description: Production-ready n8n blueprint for Codex: chat, OpenAI image generation, OpenAI image analysis/captions, document extraction/training, document Q&A, and safe workspace tools.
